title: T2SCH49 Agreement Among Associated Canadian-Controlled Private Corporations to Allocate the Expenditure Limit - Canada.ca
content:
## T2SCH49 Agreement Among Associated Canadian-Controlled Private Corporations to Allocate the Expenditure Limit
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Schedule to allocate the annual expenditure limit among associated Canadian-controlled private corporations in order to calculate the investment tax credit eligible for the 35% rate on qualifying scientific research and experim. development expenditures.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t2sch49-fill-26e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2019 – Fillable PDF (t2sch49-fill-19e.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (t2sch49-fill-13e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (t2sch49-fill-26e.pdf)

- 2013 – Fillable PDF (t2sch49-fill-13e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (t2sch49-26e.pdf) Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2019 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-19e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-13e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-11e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-09e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-08e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-06e.pdf) 2003 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-03e.pdf) 1999 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-99e.pdf) 1998 – Standard print PDF (t2sch49-98e.pdf)
